title: Feat implementation continuation from refreshed descriptions

scope.goal: Continue converting description-backed feat metadata away from placeholder numeric modifiers and toward executable roll-context rules, attack options, ability substitutions, and explicit rider/resource metadata.
sourceOfTruth: packs/feats.db refreshed feat descriptions and benefits
swse_feats_foundry_seed.json uploaded scrape seed where matching descriptions exist
scope.runtimeTesting: Static validation only; Foundry runtime testing still required.

changes: Consumes selected-choice weapon modifiers for attack and damage rolls, fixing Weapon Focus / Greater Weapon Focus / Weapon Specialization / Greater Weapon Specialization style metadata when the chosen weapon group is stored on the feat item.
Consumes safe roll-context damage modifiers such as Point-Blank Shot damage.ranged when the range context is point-blank.
Adds attack ability contribution hooks for feats such as Weapon Finesse and Mighty Throw.
Adds support for attack option gates: requiresContextFlags, requiresOpportunityAttack, excludesWeaponGroups, and excludesAreaAttack.
Attack rolls now include CombatOptionResolver attackAbilityBonus so Weapon Finesse and Mighty Throw can affect the roll formula without changing base weapon data.

Generic migrated PASSIVE/STATE attack modifiers now fail closed unless explicitly marked allowLegacyStateAttackBonus, preventing old placeholder +2 attack rows from silently applying during weapon rolls. Curated feat roll behavior now goes through CombatOptionResolver rules/options instead.

featBackfills.name: Weapon Finesse
featBackfills.implementation: Adds ATTACK_ABILITY_SUBSTITUTION for light melee weapons/lightsabers: use Dexterity instead of Strength when better.

featBackfills.name: Mighty Throw
featBackfills.implementation: Adds ATTACK_ABILITY_BONUS for thrown weapons/grenades using Strength modifier; records range-extension rule note.

featBackfills.name: Point-Blank Shot
featBackfills.implementation: +1 ranged attack remains context-gated; +1 ranged damage is now consumed by CombatOptionResolver when rangeBand/pointBlankRange indicates point-blank range.

featBackfills.name: Power Blast
featBackfills.implementation: Adds ranged slider attack option: subtract up to BAB from attack and add same amount to damage; excludes area attacks.

featBackfills.name: Sniper Shot
featBackfills.implementation: Adds ranged toggle attack option: +2 attack and -5 Reflex rider; excludes heavy/vehicle weapon groups.

featBackfills.name: Reckless Charge
featBackfills.implementation: Adds melee charge toggle: +2 attack and -2 Reflex rider.

featBackfills.name: Opportunistic Shooter
featBackfills.implementation: Adds passive ranged attack-of-opportunity option gated by opportunityAttack/isAttackOfOpportunity context.

featBackfills.name: Separatist Military Training
featBackfills.implementation: Adds adjacent-ally attack option with correct +1 attack bonus instead of old +2 scaffold.

featBackfills.name: Improved Knock Prone
featBackfills.implementation: Adds maneuver-gated +5 attack option for knock-prone attacks.

featBackfills.name: Battering Attack
featBackfills.implementation: Records Bantha Rush movement rider: target is also knocked prone. Old generic +2 attack modifier disabled.

featBackfills.name: Grappling Strike
featBackfills.implementation: Records melee-hit rider: free grapple attempt without provoking. Old generic +2 attack modifier disabled.

featBackfills.name: Wounding Strike
featBackfills.implementation: Records once-per-encounter melee-hit condition-track rider. Old generic +2 attack modifier disabled.

featBackfills.name: Pinpoint Accuracy
featBackfills.implementation: Records Aiming Accuracy damage rider: damaged target cannot Recover until end of next turn. Old generic +2 attack modifier disabled.

featBackfills.name: Collateral Damage
featBackfills.implementation: Records Rapid Shot secondary-attack rider at -2 for half damage once per turn. Old generic +2 attack modifier disabled.

featBackfills.name: Follow Through
featBackfills.implementation: Records melee-drop rider: move up to speed once per turn. Old generic +2 attack modifier disabled.

featBackfills.name: Fortifying Recovery
featBackfills.implementation: Records Recover action bonus HP rule: 2 x Constitution modifier, minimum 2. Old generic +2 attack modifier disabled.

featBackfills.name: Pitiless Warrior
featBackfills.implementation: Records on-kill temporary bonus HP rule: 5 + half character level until encounter end. Old generic +2 attack modifier disabled.

knownDeferred: Rider metadata such as Battering Attack, Pinpoint Accuracy, Collateral Damage, Follow Through, Fortifying Recovery, and Pitiless Warrior is now explicit but still needs runtime buttons/event hooks where no central post-hit/recover/on-kill hook exists yet.
Power Blast special-case Strength 13 non-vehicle penalty is not yet automated; the main BAB trade is implemented.
Mighty Throw range extension is recorded as a rule note but range-band UI automation still needs a range calculator seam.
Context-gated options require the relevant caller to pass flags such as allyAdjacent, opportunityAttack, charge, maneuver, rangeBand, or pointBlankRange.
validation: packs/feats.db parsed as valid JSONL with 419 rows
